items.title: Replit, turned 10 🎂 To celebrate we’re making it totally free for 24 hours starting at 5…
items.title_zh: Replit 迎来 10 岁生日 🎂 为了庆祝，我们将从 5 点开始 24 小时内完全免费...
items.description: Replit, turned 10 🎂 To celebrate we’re making it totally free for 24 hours starting at 5am PT. But our work—to make coding accessible for all—goes back to 2011. Watch the highlights from the journey: It’s been an honor to help millions le…
items.description_zh: Replit 迎来 10 岁生日 🎂 为了庆祝，我们从太平洋时间凌晨 5 点开始 24 小时完全免费。但我们的工作——让所有人都可以编程——可以追溯到 2011 年。观看这段旅程的亮点：很荣幸能够帮助数百万人……

items.title: Atlassian’s results surprised Wall Street, but it shouldn’t be a surprise.
items.title_zh: Atlassian 的业绩令华尔街感到惊讶，但这并不令人意外。
items.description: Atlassian’s results surprised Wall Street, but it shouldn’t be a surprise. The simple heuristic for the future of software is that when there are 100X more agents than people, which parts of software will grow because agents are doing more…
items.description_zh: Atlassian 的业绩令华尔街感到惊讶，但这并不令人意外。对于软件未来的简单启发是，当代理的数量比人多 100 倍时，软件的哪些部分将会增长，因为代理正在做更多的事情……

items.title: When I talk to enterprises outside of Silicon Valley, most of the use-cases they have in…
items.title_zh: 当我与硅谷以外的企业交谈时，他们的大多数用例......
items.description: When I talk to enterprises outside of Silicon Valley, most of the use-cases they have in mind with AI are to augment and accelerate how they work, simply because of how much more they can do right now. Most companies are not satisfied with…
items.description_zh: 当我与硅谷以外的企业交谈时，他们想到的大多数人工智能用例都是增强和加速他们的工作方式，仅仅是因为他们现在可以做更多的事情。大多数公司并不满意...

items.description: I realized a lot of people treat coding agents as their employee, whereas I actually treat it as my cofounder I don't just give orders. I present problems, describe the situation, and ask for their opinion
items.description_zh: 我意识到很多人将编码代理视为他们的员工，而我实际上将其视为我的联合创始人，我不只是发号施令。我提出问题，描述情况，并征求他们的意见
